hero.subPre: We guarantee its content is not altered and we record
hero.subPost: : SHA-256 fingerprint, unique Seal ID, date and public verification link.

paywall.title: You've used your {{limit}} free documents
paywall.text: Go Pro and seal documents with no limit.

seal.dropSubtitle: PDF, Word, PowerPoint, images or TXT · max. 50 MB
seal.notRegistered: The document was sealed and downloaded, but the seal couldn't be registered for public verification. Check your connection and try again.
seal.cautionText: the fingerprint uniquely identifies your document. Don't copy or share it on its own: share only the public verification link.
seal.uniqueStrong: your document is unique on the internet

verify.dropSubtitle: we'll check its integrity against the TRAMPTO registry
verify.authenticSub: It hasn't been modified since sealing. The Seal ID and the date prove who sealed it and when.
verify.invalidSub: This document wasn't sealed with TRAMPTO or was modified after sealing.

share.subject: Document verification · TRAMPTO
share.defaultText: Verify this document sealed with TRAMPTO

errors.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported format. Upload a PDF, Word (DOCX), PowerPoint (PPTX), image or TXT.
errors.tooBig: The document must be under 50 MB.
errors.legacyOffice: That's an old Office format (.ppt/.doc). Open it in PowerPoint or Word and use "Save as" → .pptx, .docx or PDF.
errors.sealFailed: Couldn't seal the document. Make sure the file isn't damaged.
errors.pdfProtected: This PDF is password-protected. Remove the protection and try again.
errors.verifyNeedsPdf: Verification is done with the sealed PDF you downloaded.
errors.verifyFailed: Couldn't verify the document. Please try again.
